# README images

Place the final GitHub images here:

```text
docs/images/
├── logo.png
├── logo.svg
├── banner.png
├── dashboard.png
├── root-causes.png
├── actions.png
├── explorer.png
└── installation.png
```

## Current recommended screenshots

Use the screenshots from the generated HTML dashboard:

1. Dashboard top section
2. Top Root Causes
3. Recommended Actions
4. Explorer page
5. Installation Overview

## Notes

Before publishing screenshots:

* remove tokens
* remove exact URLs if needed
* avoid exposing sensitive location/device names unless intentional
* prefer redacted or demo data for public screenshots
